title: BetterRaidBells
description: Extends the Range of Bells Raider Glowing Detection
body:
# BetterRaidBells

BetterRaidBells extends the reach of the raider glowing effect when ringing a bell to 128 blocks (the vanilla limit for mob loading and rendering). This plugin is written for Spigot but will should work correctly with Bukkit or Paper.

## Installation Guide
To install this plugin you must be running Spigot Bukkit or Paper, then once you have run the server once to create your main directories you can simply drag and drop it into "plugins" and after a restart or reload, it is ready to go out of the box, ring a bell and you're away.

## Lisencing
BetterRaidBells is a completely open-source project under the MIT license and all the code can be found through the **External Resources** tab on the side panel, or via the link below.

## Additional Links
[Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/betterraidbells/versions) exclusive to Modrinth can be found here.

[Source Code](https://github.com/tnn1nja/betterraidbells) can be found here.

[Issue Tracker](https://github.com/tnn1nja/betterraidbells/issues) if you want to report any bugs you can do so here.

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@tnn1nja) you can find more from me here.
